hero.badge: Bayanan da aka duba • Fasahar hango abubuwa • An tantance rajista
hero.subtitle: Daga cikin bayanan masu bayarwa na duniya {{suppliers}}—{{leads}} ingantattun shawarwarin kasuwanci, nazarin AI, da bayanai masu dacewa. Inganci fiye da yawa. Ku shiga tare da sama da 50,000 masu sayayya.
trust.byProcurers: An amince da shi daga masu sayayya a duniya
trust.byDecisionMakers: An amince da shi daga masu yanke hukunci a duniya
trust.worldwide: An amince da shi daga ƙungiyoyin neman kaya a duniya
stat.verifiedSuppliers: Masu bayarwa da aka tantance & ƙara

home.supplierNetwork.titleSuffix: Masu Kaya da aka Tabbatar da Rajista & Inganta
home.supplierNetwork.subtitlePrefix: {{suppliers}} masu kaya da aka tantance a cikin
home.supplierNetwork.subtitleSuffix: kasashe—tabbatar da rajista, ingancin bin doka, shirye don zurfin bincike.
home.supplierRegions.title: Masu Kaya bisa Yanki
home.industries.badge: Masana'antu da Muke Yi Aiki da Su
home.industries.title: Masana'antu Sama da 20. An Zaba Don Tattalin Arzikin Gaskiya.
home.industries.subtitle: Daga hakar ma'adanai da masana'antu zuwa kiwon lafiya da na'urorin lantarki—masu kaya da aka tabbatar da rajista da aka tsara don masana'antu da sayen B2B.
home.features.badge: Matsaloli guda uku. Dandalin guda ɗaya.
home.features.title: An gina shi don lokutan da suka fi muhimmanci a cikin saye
home.features.subtitle: Ba wani bayanan tuntuɓar gama gari ba. Ilimin masu kaya mai zurfi, farashin da aka kawo, da manyan hanyoyin kasuwanci—an tsara su don saye, ayyuka, da ƙungiyoyin saye.
home.showcase.title: Hankali Da Ke Taimakawa Samun Sakamako
home.showcase.subtitle: Cikakken bayyani kan masu kaya, farashi, da hadari. {{suppliers}} bayanai—ana sabunta su akai-akai, mai inganci, ba tare da ƙoƙarin ƙarfi ba.
home.howItWorks.title: Daga Bincike Zuwa Shawara a Cikin Minti
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Matakai uku masu sauƙi don saye mai hankali. Babu wahala. Abin da kawai ke kawo sakamako.
home.step1.title: Fada Mana Abinda Kake Bukata
home.step1.desc: Shigar da samfurinka, takamaiman bayanai, yawan kaya, da yankunan da kake nufi. AI ɗinmu na fahimtar abin da kake nema daidai.
home.step2.title: AI Na Aiki Mai Nauyi
home.step2.desc: Muna nazarin jadawalin masu samar da kayayyaki na duniya {{suppliers}}, muna lissafin farashin da ya dace, da kuma kimanta hadarin—tushen rajista, ingancin bin doka.
home.step3.title: Yanke Shawara Tare da Tabbas
home.step3.desc: Samu cikakken rahoto tare da masu samar da kayayyaki da suka cancanta, rarraba farashi, da shawarwari masu amfani.
home.cta.title: Shawarar Masu Hikima Sun Fara Anan
home.cta.subtitle: Shiga cikin kwararrun masu saye 50,000+ da suka daina hasashe kuma suka fara nemo tare da kwarin gwiwa.
home.cta.footer: Babu katin kiredit · Shirin kyauta · Zai iya soke a kowane lokaci
footer.tagline: Sourcing da hankali na kasuwanci tare da AI don masu saye na ƙwararren.
footer.designedFor: Masu bayarwa na farko. Hankalin kasuwanci na farko. An gina don ƙungiyoyin kasuwanci.
trust.strip1: Ana amincewa da ƙungiyoyin sourcing a duniya
home.feature1.title: Hankali Kan Hadari
home.feature1.desc: Yi amfani da bayanan masu samar da kayayyaki {{suppliers}} a duk fadin ƙasashe {{countries}}+. Gano hadarin siyasa, na kudi, da na aiki kafin su shafi kasuwancinka—kulawa ta hanyar AI da faɗakarwar ingancin bin doka.
home.feature2.title: Mai Lissafin Farashi Mai Sauka
home.feature2.desc: Samu ainihin farashin da ya haɗa da haraji, jigilar kaya, inshora, da canje-canje na kudade. Zurfin ilimin kasuwanci, ba hasashe ba. Babu kuɗaɗen mamaki.
home.feature3.title: Gano Masu Sayen & Hanyoyin Kasuwanci
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} masu saye & hanyoyin kasuwanci—an tsara su ta hanyar AI bisa ga niyyar, bayanan kamfani, da siginar kasuwanci. Ba tare da bazawa ba. Ingantaccen, mai iya nazari bayanai ga ƙungiyoyin saye.
home.feature4.title: Binciken Doka Ya Zama Mai Sauƙi
home.feature4.desc: Tabbatarwa ta tushen rajista, duba takardun shaida, da hanyoyin cancanta. Bayanan ingancin bin doka don ka mai da hankali kan abin da ya fi mahimmanci.
home.feature5.title: Bayanan Masu Samar da Duniya
home.feature5.desc: Samun damar {{suppliers}} masu samar da kayayyaki da aka tabbatar da amincewa a cikin ƙasashe {{countries}}. Zaɓi bisa ga masana'antu, yanki, takardun shaida. Gano wanda ya dace a cikin seconds.
home.feature6.title: Rahotanni Masu Karfi na AI
home.feature6.desc: Rahotanni masu zurfi kan hanyoyin saye tare da nazarin kasuwa, kwatancen masu kaya, da shawarwari masu amfani. Ingantaccen zurfi don ƙungiyoyin saye.
home.industry1.title: Hakowa & Ma'adinai
home.industry1.desc: Antimony, tin, lithium, cobalt, copper, da ma'adinai masu tsada. Masu bayar da ma'adinai da aka tabbatar don muhimman hanyoyin samarwa.
home.industry2.title: Kera & Masana'antu
home.industry2.desc: Samu kayan aiki, sassa, da kayan aiki daga masana'antun da aka tabbatar a duniya.
home.industry3.title: Kayan Lantarki & Fasaha
home.industry3.desc: Nemo masu bayar da semiconductor, masu kera PCB, da masu rarraba sassan fasaha.
home.industry4.title: Kayan Masu Amfani & Talla
home.industry4.desc: Haɗa kai da masu bayar da kayan marufi, kayayyakin da aka gama, da kayayyakin alamar kai.
home.industry5.title: Motoci & Transport
home.industry5.desc: Samu sassan motoci, sassan OEM, da kayan aikin sufuri a duniya.
home.industry6.title: Kiwan Lafiya & Kayan Kiwon Lafiya
home.industry6.desc: Nemo masu bayar da kayan aikin likitanci da kayayyakin kiwon lafiya da suka dace da FDA.
home.industry7.title: Gine-gine & Kayan Aiki
home.industry7.desc: Samu kayan gini, kayan aikin nauyi, da kayan aikin gini.
persona.procurers.headline: Rage haɗari. Inganta ribar. Kasance daidai.
persona.procurers.subline: Tantance masu kaya da AI, daidai farashin kayayyaki, da lura da bin doka ga ƙungiyoyin sayayya.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Taimaka da sauri. Faɗaɗa hikima. Fara da wuri.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Samun masu kaya da aka tabbatar cikin mintuna, ba makonni ba. Farashi mai kyau ga masu farawa tare da kayan aikin ingancin kamfani.
persona.suppliers.headline: Samun ganewa. Samu karin RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Shiga cikin masu kaya {{suppliers}} da aka tabbatar. Karɓi binciken masu saye da suka cancanta kuma haɓaka kasuwancin kauyanka.
persona.producers.headline: Kula da farashi. Tabbatar da inganci. Faɗaɗa hanyoyin.
persona.producers.subline: Samar da kayan ƙera, ƙididdigar farashi, da kuma faɗaɗa masu kaya don shugabannin masana'antu.
methodology.title: Yadda muke tantance masu kaya
methodology.subtitle: Fahimtar manufofinmu yana gina amana. Ga yadda muke tabbatar da ingancin bayanai.
methodology.step1.title: Tattara bayanai
methodology.step1.desc: Muna haɗa bayanan masu kaya daga rajistar kasuwanci, takardun shaidar, da hanyoyin kasuwanci da aka tabbatar. Ana sabunta zane mai zaman kansa na masu kaya daga ko'ina cikin duniya.
methodology.step2.title: Tantancewa
methodology.step2.desc: Kowane mai kaya yana ƙarƙashin tantance rajistar kasuwanci, tabbatar da tarihin kasuwanci, da duban bin doka. Tabbatar da rajista, ingancin doka.
methodology.step3.title: Kimantawa inganci
methodology.step3.desc: Algoritms ɗinmu suna kimanta masu kaya bisa ga lokacin amsa, matsayi na shaidar, da ra'ayoyin masu saye. AI-rank, babban alama.
methodology.step4.title: Kulawa a kai a kai
methodology.step4.desc: Muna ci gaba da lura da alamar haɗari da sabunta matsayin masu kaya bisa ga bayanan lokacin ainihi. Tabbatar da basira, tushen rajista.
integrationsPage.title: Hada SmartSeek da Tsarinku
integrationsPage.subtitle: Haɗa masu kaya, RFQs, da farashin da aka kai tare da tsarin sayayya da ERP ɗinku. OAuth mai danna guda, API mai tsaro, da haɗaɗɗun masu haɗawa.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Hada da kayan aikin sayayya na yanzu. Bayanai suna ci gaba da kasancewa tare da juna a kai a kai.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Zaɓi SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, ko wasu daga cikin jerin.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Tsarin OAuth 2.0—ba a raba kalmar sirri. Ana goyon bayan SSO na kamfani.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Masu kaya, RFQs, da bayanan farashi suna gudana tsakanin tsarin a cikin lokacin ainihi.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: An tabbatar da SOC 2. An leƙe bayanan a cikin hanya da a lokacin ajiye. Babu shaidar da aka ajiye.
integrationsPage.allPlatforms: Duk dandamalin da ake goyon baya

home.trial.footer: Babu katin bashi • Rahotanni 2 kyauta • Cikakken damar shiga dandalin

home.testimonials.title: An Amince da su daga Masu Sayayya, 'Yan Kasuwa & Masu Kera
home.testimonials.subtitle: Ayyuka na gaske daga ƙungiyoyi da suka canza zuwa ingantaccen tsarin sayayya.
home.benefits.saveTitle: Ajiye Lokaci & Kudi a Kowane Shawara
home.benefits.saveDesc: Masu amfani da SmartSeek suna bayar da rahoton ingantaccen ajiye kudi, rage hadari, da saurin sayayya. Duba bambanci a cikin rahoton ku na farko.
home.benefits.qualification: Inganta tantance masu kaya da kashi 75%
home.benefits.resilience: Ingantaccen juriya na tsarin samarwa da kashi 40%
home.benefits.compliance: Kulawa da bin doka a ainihin lokaci
home.benefits.securityTitle: Tsaro da za ku iya dogara akai
home.benefits.securityDesc: SmartSeek yana cika mafi girman ka'idojin tsaro da bin doka, tare da tabbatar da SOC 2, ɓoyewar bayanai, da kuma kulawa da izinin bisa ga rawar da mutum ke takawa.
home.benefits.encryption: Ɓoyewar bayanai daga farko zuwa ƙarshe
home.ready.title: Shirye ku fara samun ingantaccen kaya?
home.ready.subtitle: Fara yanke shawarar sayayya mafi kyau yau. Babu buƙatar katin kiredit.
dashboard.subtitle: Hikimar sourcing mai amfani da AI a hannunku.

home.testimonial1.quote: SmartSeek ya rage lokacin tantance masu kaya da kashi 60%. Binciken hadarin da AI ke gudanarwa yana ba mu kwarin gwiwa a kowane yanke shawarar sayayya da muke yi.
home.testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen
home.testimonial1.role: VP na Sayayya, Global Manufacturing Corp
home.testimonial2.quote: Lissafin farashin da aka kawo kawai ya ceci mu daga abubuwa uku masu tsada a kwata na baya. Ya zama kayan aiki mai mahimmanci ga tawagar mu ta sayayya ta duniya.
home.testimonial2.name: Marcus Weber
home.testimonial3.quote: Mun gano masu kaya da aka tabbatar a wurare da ba mu yi tunani akai ba. Rahotannin AI na SmartSeek sun ba mu bayanan da muke bukata don bambanta hanyar samar da mu.
home.testimonial3.name: Priya Sharma
home.testimonial3.role: Shugabar Tsarin Sourcing, Atlas Retail Group
home.hero.badge: Hankali mai kyau na samo kaya ga ƙungiyoyin saye
home.hero.title1: San farashin ka na gaske kafin ka yarda
home.hero.subtitleBase: Nemo masu kaya, lissafa ainihin farashin shigo (jirgin ruwa, haraji, kuɗin shigo, cikin gida), da yanke hukunci da kwarin gwiwa.
home.hero.painLine: Daina aika imel marasa kyau. Daina hasashen farashi. Daina mamakin haraji.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Nemo masu kaya ta hanyar kayan abu, tsari, yanki, ko takardar shaida
home.hero.proofLine: Matsakaicin bincike yana dawo da {{matches}} masu dacewa da aka tabbatar a cikin ƙasa da dakika guda
home.hero.chip1: Babu katin bashi da ake bukata
home.hero.chip3: Bayanan da aka tabbatar daga hanyoyi da dama
home.integrations.label: Yana haɗuwa da kayan aikin da ƙungiyar sayan ku ke amfani da su
home.feat1.quote: "Muna ɓata makonni 3 muna aika imel ga masu kaya da ba sa amsa — har yanzu muna samun wadanda ba daidai ba."
home.feat1.title: Samu masu kaya da aka tabbatar cikin seconds
home.feat1.desc: Tuntuɓi masu kaya da aka tabbatar daga {{suppliers}} masu kaya. An duba daga rajistar kamfanoni, bayanan kasuwanci, da hanyoyin waje.
home.feat1.b1: Imel & waya suna ciki — babu buƙatar bincike
home.feat1.b2: Filter bisa takardun shaida, ƙasa, MOQ, ma'aikata
home.feat2.quote: "Mun tsara kasafin kuɗi na $42k. Invoicen ya ce $61k. Bambancin shine haraji da ba mu san suna ba."
home.feat2.title: Sanin farashin ku na gaske kafin ku yarda
home.feat2.desc: Haraji, sufuri, inshora, kuɗin tashar, VAT — an ƙididdige su kafin lokaci. Babu mamaki lokacin da kwantena ya iso.
home.feat2.b1: Duba lambar HS & farashin haraji na kai tsaye
home.feat3.quote: "Babban mai kaya namu yana cikin yanki da ya zama mai rashin kwanciyar hankali. Ba mu da shirin madadin kuma mun rasa makonni 6 na samarwa."
home.feat3.title: Gano haɗarin mai kaya kafin ya yi muku asara
home.feat3.desc: Bi alamu na haɗarin samo kaya a tsakanin masu kaya da yankuna kafin su zama mamaki masu tsada.
home.feat3.b1: Alamomin haɗarin mai kaya da ƙasa a cikin kallo ɗaya
home.feat3.b2: Alamomin siyasa da bin doka a ainihin lokaci
home.feat3.b3: Zaɓuɓɓuka da aka ba da shawara ta atomatik
home.pain.stat1desc: Matsakaicin lokacin da ƙungiyoyin sayayya ke ɓata akan binciken masu kaya na hannu
home.pain.stat2desc: Kimanin asarar shekara-shekara ga kowace kamfani daga ɓoyayyun kuɗin shigo da kaya da zaɓin masu kaya marasa kyau
home.pain.stat3desc: Matsakaicin rage farashi da masu amfani da SmartSeek suka bayar a cikin kwanakin su na farko 90
home.pain.footnote: Masu amfani da SmartSeek suna daga awanni 14 na bincike na mako zuwa ƙasa da awanni 2. Wannan yana nufin awanni 12 a dawo — kowacce mako.
home.hiw.title: Daga bincike zuwa kwangila cikin kwanaki — ba watanni ba
home.hiw.step1.title: Nemo
home.hiw.step1.desc: Bincika masu bayarwa miliyan 25.2 a kasashe 220. Samu ingantaccen jituwa tare da bayanan tuntuɓar.
home.hiw.step2.title: Lissafi
home.hiw.step2.desc: Duba farashin da aka kawo a cikin seconds. Kwatanta masu bayarwa bisa ga jimlar farashin da aka kawo, ba kawai farashin kowane guda ba.
home.hiw.step3.title: Yanke Shawara
home.hiw.step3.desc: Tuntuɓi masu bayarwa kai tsaye, aika RFQs, kuma ci gaba — duk daga dandalin guda.
home.cta.title2: nemo tare da basira. Kai fa?
home.pain.badge: Matsaloli guda uku. Dandalin guda ɗaya.

home.integrations.sectionDesc: Haɗa masu samarwa, jagorori, da bayanan sayayya kai tsaye cikin tsarin ERP, CRM, da tsarin sayayya da kuke da su. Babu fitarwa na hannu.
home.demo.badge: Demo kai tsaye — Babu buƙatar rajista
home.demo.desc: Nemo bayananmu na duniya nan take. Duba sakamakon masu samarwa na gaskiya — bayanan tuntuɓar da cikakken damar an buɗe tare da asusun kyauta.
home.demo.placeholder: Gwada: "masana'antar zane auduga Turkiyya" ko "panels na hasken rana Sin"
home.demo.suppliersFound: masu samarwa an samo — ana nuna sakamakon kyauta 3
home.demo.enterProduct: Shigar da kowanne samfur, kayan aiki, ko masana'antu a sama
home.demo.clickQuick: Ko kuma danna bincike mai sauri don ganin sakamakon nan take
home.demo.noCreditCard: Babu katin kiredit da ake bukata
home.demo.freeUnlocks: Asusun kyauta yana bude cikakken jerin masu samarwa da ingantaccen bayanin tuntuɓar.
home.capabilities.title: Injiniyoyin basira guda uku. Dandalin guda ɗaya.
home.capabilities.subtitle: Daga gano masu samarwa zuwa basirar kasuwa ta AI — komai da ƙungiyar sayan ku ke bukata.
home.capabilities.findSuppliersDesc: Nemo masu kaya na duniya da aka tabbatar da su bisa ga samfur, kasa, takardar shaida, da girma. An shirya su don tuntuba tare da maki inganci.
home.capabilities.findLeadsDesc: Jagororin saye da kasuwanci da aka tantance. Ayi tacewa bisa ga niyyar, masana'antu, yanki, da girman kamfani. An gina su don fitar da B2B.
home.capabilities.findLeadsChip1: Jagororin da ke da niyya mai karfi
home.capabilities.aiIntelDesc: Kimanta hadarin a cikin lokaci, lissafin farashin da aka kawo, duba bin ka'idojin kasuwanci, da nazarin tsarin samar da kayayyaki na hasashe.
home.capabilities.aiIntelChip2: AI na farashin da aka kawo
home.searchPlaceholder: Nemo masu kaya na duniya da aka tabbatar...
home.testimonialCard1.quote: Mun rage lokacin tantance masu kaya daga makonni 3 zuwa kwana 2. Bayan bayanan da aka tabbatar da shi kadai yana da daraja 10x na $49/wata — ya ceci €40K a kan wani aikin.
home.testimonialCard1.name: Marcus Klein
home.testimonialCard2.quote: A ƙarshe, wata dandamali da ta fahimci wahalar lissafin farashi. Lissafin haraji yana daidai ga shigo da India.
home.testimonialCard2.name: Sunita Patel
home.testimonialCard3.quote: SmartSeek ya gano mana masu kaya 40+ da aka tantance na antimony cikin ƙasa da minti ɗaya. Tsohon bayananmu yana da 3.
home.testimonialCard3.name: Jason Liu
home.testimonialCard4.quote: Hankalin haɗari ya nuna mana matsalolin kudi na mai kaya daga Turkey makonni 6 kafin mu gano.
home.testimonialCard4.name: Elena Ferretti
home.trust.operatorRouting: Hanyar RFQ da aka duba ta masu gudanarwa
home.trust.structuredQuotes: Fannonin kwangila masu tsari (MOQ, lokacin jagora, Incoterms)
home.trustBlock.heading: Gaskiya bayanai. Gaskiya farashi. Gaskiya yanke shawara.
home.trustBlock.body: SmartSeek yana haɗa ku da bayanan masu samarwa da aka goyi bayan rajista kuma yana ba ku cikakken hoto na farashin da aka kawo — ba kawai farashin guda ba. An gina shi ta masu gudanarwa da suka kware a kasuwancin duniya fiye da shekaru 15.
home.trustBlock.bullet1: Bayanai masu samarwa da aka goyi bayan rajista, babu hasashe na shafuka
home.trustBlock.bullet2: Gaskiya farashin da aka kawo: jigilar kaya, customs, haraji, cikin gida — duk a ciki
home.trustBlock.bullet3: Hanyoyin kai tsaye zuwa tushe da tuntube kamfanoni
home.trustBlock.cta: Ku kasance cikin masu amfani 100 na farko — farashin memba na asali an kulle
home.globalEngine: Dandamalin Gano Masu Kaya na Duniya
home.hero.banner: Kyauta a lokacin beta · Ana bude gwajin siye
home.hero.subtitle: Gano masu kaya da aka tabbatar don ƙarfe masu mahimmanci da kayan aikin masana'antu. Aika RFQ kuma karɓi tsararrun ƙididdiga tare da MOQ, lokacin jagora, da Incoterms daga masu kaya da aka cancanta.
home.hero.builtFor: An gina don ƙungiyoyin sayan masana'antu da ke gudanar da hanyoyin sayan da aka tsara.
home.how.title: Hanyar sayan ba tare da hayaniya daga kasuwa ba
home.how.step1Desc: Bayyana abin da kuke bukata: kaya, ƙayyadaddun bayanai, adadi, wuri, lokacin jagora. Yana ɗaukar minti 2.
home.how.step2Title: Muna aika zuwa masu kaya da aka tabbatar
home.how.step2Desc: Mai gudanar da sayan SmartSeek yana tantance RFQ ɗinku kuma yana aikawa kawai ga masu kaya da aka duba a cikin rajistar kamfanoni.
home.how.step3Desc: Ƙididdiga suna zuwa tare da incoterms, lokacin jagora, MOQ, da asalin mai kaya. Kuna yanke shawarar wanda za ku haɗa.
home.why.title: Babu bayanai da aka kwashe. Babu tayin jari hujja. Babu wasan kwaikwayo na kasuwa.
home.why.body: Duk mai kaya da muke buga an duba su a cikin rajistar kamfanoni — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — kuma an tabbatar da su ta hanyar tuntuɓar kai tsaye. Ana aika RFQs ta hanyar mai gudanar da sayan mutum, ba ta hanyar algorithm ba.
home.why.pill3: Tuntuɓar mai kaya kai tsaye, ba tare da wakili ba
home.founding.body: Muna karɓar ƙungiyoyin sayayya masu ma'ana a lokacin beta don kowanne asusun ya sami goyon bayan samun kaya kai tsaye da saurin jagorar masu kaya.
home.preview.lockTitle: Dukkanin jerin suna samuwa ga masu amfani na farko
home.preview.lockBody: Kyauta a lokacin beta. Muna karɓar masu saye da hannu don kowanne asusun ya sami goyon bayan samun kaya.
home.sections.previewBadge: Duba masu kaya da aka tsara
home.sections.previewTitle: Masu kaya da aka tabbatar daga masana'antu da kasuwannin duniya
home.sections.previewBody: Misalin masu kaya da aka tabbatar a rajista daga fannonin karafa, kera, sinadarai, tufafi, da sauran su. Dukkanin jerin suna buɗe ga masu amfani na farko a lokacin beta.
home.founding.noPayment: Babu katin kiredit. Babu tsarin biyan kudi a lokacin beta.
home.seo.description: Hanyoyin samun bayanai na dabarun saye da gano masu kaya don ƙungiyoyin saye na masana'antu.
